perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in an orange t-shirt enters a living room with a gray sofa where a woman and a child are sitting. He acts eccentric, holding a pen and paper, pretending to 'buy' everything in sight by writing checks. (2) He points at the room, then at a woman holding a phone, and then at a small child, handing over paper slips each time. (3) The scene cuts to the man holding a smartphone, displaying the Shopee app interface and several short video clips. (4) He demonstrates the 'Shopee Affiliate Program' by showing how to navigate the app, post videos, and earn commissions. (5) The man and the woman stand together at the end, pointing towards the camera and showing a referral code on the screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic BGM starts immediately. A high-pitched male voice speaks excitedly, making exaggerated 'ka-ching' and 'bingo' sound effects as he pretends to buy things. (2) A female voice reacts with laughter and surprised interjections. (3) The BGM stays consistent but lowers in volume as the male voice transitions into an instructional tone, explaining the steps of a money-making program. (4) Frequent sound effects like sparkles and success bells punctuate key points in the explanation. (5) The video ends with the man and woman speaking in unison, followed by a final jingle.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'POV：有錢人跟你想的不一樣？' (POV: Rich people are different than you think?). (2) Effect text: '哎呦哎呦' (Whoa whoa) and '阿嘎！買了！' (A-Gua! Bought it!). (3) Functional text: '這是我家' (This is my house) used to indicate dialogue. (4) Promotional text: '蝦皮分潤計劃' (Shopee Affiliate Program) and '蝦皮短影音' (Shopee Short Video). (5) CTA text: '快使用我的推薦碼 R6B4D5E' (Quickly use my referral code R6B4D5E) in bold red and white.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Skit Hook -> Transition -> Product/App Demonstration -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female co-star, and 1 young girl on the sofa.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man wears a bright orange oversized t-shirt and white pants. The woman wears a black t-shirt with 'HAHABABY' printed on it and leopard print shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home interior with a light-colored sofa, shelves filled with character figurines and toys, and a wooden coffee table. Later, close-up shots of a smartphone screen.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting with a warm tone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage -> List-based: Skit Hook -> Feature Explanation -> Reward Proof -> Referral CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Shopee Affiliate Program by demonstrating how users can earn high commissions through creating short videos. It uses a humorous skit about wealth to hook viewers before providing a step-by-step tutorial on using the app's features.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal call-to-action, screen recording of the app, and display of a unique referral code.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature comedic style, involving family members and loud, colorful variety-show graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges entertainment and marketing, a common strategy for top-tier Taiwanese influencers to maintain engagement during advertisements.
